name: noisemaker-for-blender-tools
description: Offline tooling for Noisemaker for Blender. These scripts import the SIBLING reference engine (../../shaders/src/index.js) — the unchanged JS Noisemaker compiler — to export golden render-graph JSON from DSL and regenerate effect-definition JSON for the Blender add-on. No build step is required; the reference is plain browser-compatible ESM run under Node only for tooling. Override the reference root with NM_REFERENCE_ROOT if this folder is relocated.
